subcodes.first_line: In truth, this word adorns the brocaded pages of love, affection and sincerity - blessed be His utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه اینکلمه زینت دیباج دفاتر محبت و مودت و خلوص است قوله تبارک و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @high station of learning, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
